heroTitle: Your LinkedIn is your highest-ROI asset. Treat it that way.
heroDesc: Stop posting into the void. Build a LinkedIn presence that positions you as the authority in your space and generates inbound without a sales team.

process.title: Audit
process.body: Full analysis of your current LinkedIn profile, content history, and positioning vs. competitors in your space.

process.title: Positioning
process.body: Define your unique point of view, audience persona, and the one thing you want to be known for.

process.title: Profile
process.body: Optimise every element: headline, about section, banner, and featured section, for maximum first-impression impact.

process.title: Content System
process.body: Build your 5-pillar content system, posting schedule, and hook framework. Create 30 days of initial content.

process.title: Grow
process.body: Execute consistently, engage strategically, and scale what works. Monthly reviews to refine and improve.

goodFit.item: Founders, executives, and consultants who want inbound from LinkedIn
People with genuine expertise but no platform yet
Those willing to post consistently for 90+ days
Anyone who understands brand-building is a long game

badFit.item: People who want followers but no engagement strategy
Those expecting viral results in 2 weeks
Brands without a clear point of view or expertise
Anyone who won't commit to consistent posting

ctaHeadline: Ready to turn LinkedIn into your best acquisition channel?
ctaSubtext: Let's build a LinkedIn presence that generates leads while you sleep.
